      "text": "Ta irr tas KUNGS fa-

"

"

    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Salamans stahweja

"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas tu tawam Kalpam

"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un uu KUNGS/ Isra-

    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ al Israëta Deeigs

    {
      "n": 28,

      "text": "Tapehz greeſees pee taw-

"

"

      "n": 30,
